items.title: Venom and Hot Peppers Offer a Key to Killing Resistant Bacteria
items.summary: Researchers have developed three new antibiotics from scorpion venom and habanero peppers to combat tuberculosis and other drug-resistant pathogens.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices as chip crisis bites
items.summary: It sold 19.86 million Switch 2s last year but forecasts a drop in sales next year.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
